name: AUGMANITAI 1000-Term Compendium — Dataset SBOM (structural demonstration)
_note: STRUCTURAL DEMONSTRATION ONLY. AUGMANITAI is a terminology DATASET, not an AI system. No training, no inference, no regulatory conformance claims apply to AUGMANITAI itself. This SBOM documents the dataset's files and licenses for supply-chain transparency; it does not assert any ISO certification, EU AI Act conformity, or performance metrics. Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified (§16). Restricted applications per §20. See DISCLAIMER.md in the repository root.

packages.name: AUGMANITAI 1000-Term Compendium
packages.description: 1000 terms describing phenomena at the human-AI interface. Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). Informed by ISO 704 / ISO 1087 / ISO 30042 (ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified — §16). Restricted applications per §20.

packages.name: AUGMANITAI Ontology (OWL / RDF Turtle)
packages.description: Formal OWL ontology over the AUGMANITAI compendium. Uses W3C SKOS, OntoLex-Lemon, SHACL. No inference engine ships; no ML model is included.

packages.name: AUGMANITAI TBX Export
packages.description: TermBase eXchange serialization (TBX file format informed by ISO 30042; no ISO certification asserted).

doesNotClaim.performanceMetrics: None asserted; AUGMANITAI is a dataset, not a model.
doesNotClaim.regulatoryEndorsement: None. No affiliation with any regulatory body.
